docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2020 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. GREGORY DZIEGIELEWSKI DOES NOT OWE KAREN LUM ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DEC-03-2019. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT LUM, KAREN TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT DZIEGIELEWSKI, GREGORY UNUSUAL COMBINATION OF CIRCUMSTANCE WITH NO ONE CLEARLY "AT FAULT". DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR FEB-19-2020 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER SEE SCANNED DOC. FILED BY DZIEGIELEWSKI, GREGORY LUM, KAREN
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,680.00 FILED BY LUM, KAREN AS TO DEFENDANT DZIEGIELEWSKI, GREGORY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2020 BY MICHELLE BRANT. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELLE BRANT, CLERK A. DATT, NOT REPORTED. (525)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED NOV-02-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DZIEGIELEWSKI, GREGORY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KARN LUM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREGORY DZIEGIELEWSKI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUM, KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DZIEGIELEWSKI, GREGORY $2,680.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,730.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT DZIEGIELEWSKI, GREGORY MAILED TO RESPONDENT LUM, KAREN
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-19-2020 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-19-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant Gregory Dziegielewski the moving party.
Respondent, Plaintiff Karen Lum the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant, Defendant Gregory Dziegielewski testifies on her behalf. The following evidence is submitted:
#1:Pictures of text message exchanges.

Respondent, Plaintiff Karen Lum testifies on her own behalf.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, Clerk A. Datt, Not Recorded. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Judgment Entered
